description_for_human: Browse and install 39+ production-grade AI agent skills for OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. Skills cover development, documents, multimedia, automation, health, and productivity.
description_for_model: This plugin provides access to Sol AI's skills marketplace — a curated catalog of 39+ AI agent skills. An agent can browse the catalog, get skill details, install instructions, and discover skills by category. Skills are installable via 'openclaw skills install <url>' or 'openclaw skills install <name>'. The marketplace is at https://thesolai.github.io/skills/
